since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.77%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.36% · BTC +1.70% · Gold -0.36% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.77%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.77%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +15.23%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.23%, VRT +5.70%, MU +5.42%, INTC +5.00%, PWR +4.32%. Laggards: AVAV -11.00%, SPCX -10.77%, ARM -7.28%, PLTR -6.28%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.77% at $165.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
